name: Dolph and the Lundgrens
overview: The price for Dolph Lundgren's career as an action hero in Hollywood was high: his two daughters Ida and Greta, 29 and 23, grew up without him on the other side of the Atlantic. Now they want to repair the relationship. Dolph, now with his new young wife Emma, ​​faces his most difficult task yet: to be present. Is it too late - or can even an action hero find reconciliation?

trailers.title: Dolph and the Lundgrens | Trailer | SVT
